case_title: DIANA MERLETTI VS. RANTHY NOERLISTYA RAHAJENG et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-08-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
